description: Three-skill operation: job, equipment, and materials
prompt: Start job 'Emergency Repair' for client City Council, allocate the portable generator CRL0200 and add 10L of diesel fuel

expected.job: create job: job_name=Emergency Repair, client_name=City Council
expected.equipment: allocate equipment CRL0200 to new job
expected.material: add material: diesel fuel qty=10L to new job
